title: CowGirl
description: Replaces vanilla cows with cowgirls (female cow)
body:
|**CowGirl / Need [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home), (or mods like etf, emf, etc. that will make this work on Fabric)** |:---:| ______________________________________________________________________________ |**Resource pack that applies rule 63 to regular vanilla cows, replacing them with anthro female cows (cowgirls, literally)** |:---:| ``` Works for 1.19.2+ and higher ```
______________________________________________________________________________ |**In the game, her name was also changed from an ordinary cow to a cowgirl. Also, this pack plans to be update in the future if you like it.** |:---:|
